dim1_install_correctness.summary: Auto-test passes 100%, idempotency verified in code, clean rollback.

dim3_ux.summary: README B→A→C clear, error messages diagnostic, SKILL.md documented, help text comprehensive.

dim4_test_coverage.summary: 16 unit+integration tests (paths 6, installer 8, cli 2+), E2E auto-test strong, edge cases covered.

dim5_gnomon_compat.summary: SKILL.md commands verified against spec, MCP entry uses [mcp] extra correctly, config schema valid.
